signal_layers.label: Confirmed truth
signal_layers.description: Official docs, changelog, release notes, status, and long-form blog updates.

signal_layers.label: Observation layer
signal_layers.description: Fast signals such as official X posts that need confirmation before promotion.

vendors.label: OpenAI
vendors.description: Track official model, API, and product updates before they get paraphrased downstream.
vendors.official_first_move: Start with the API changelog and status before repeating a claim.
vendors.x_policy_summary: Treat OpenAI on X as a fast signal only until docs, status, or a longer-form post corroborates it.

starter_watchlist.name: OpenAI signals
starter_watchlist.briefing_goal: What changed across official OpenAI channels this week?

confirmation_chain.label: Fast signal
confirmation_chain.description: Use official X as observation only.

confirmation_chain.label: Confirm
confirmation_chain.description: Promote only after changelog, status, help release notes, or blog corroborates it.

channels.label: API changelog
channels.why_it_matters: Model and API contract truth lands here first.

channels.label: ChatGPT release notes
channels.why_it_matters: User-facing product rollouts and behavior changes.

channels.label: OpenAI status
channels.why_it_matters: Incidents explain runtime regressions without guesswork.

channels.label: OpenAI developers blog
channels.why_it_matters: Long-form developer launches, migration notes, and rollout framing.

channels.label: OpenAI on X
channels.why_it_matters: Fast hints and screenshots, not final truth.

vendors.label: Anthropic
vendors.description: Track Claude, API, and developer-surface changes through official release and reliability channels.
vendors.official_first_move: Start with Anthropic release notes and status before taking a social post as truth.
vendors.x_policy_summary: Treat Anthropic on X as observation until release notes, docs, or status confirms it.

starter_watchlist.name: Anthropic signals
starter_watchlist.briefing_goal: What changed across official Anthropic channels this week?

confirmation_chain.label: Fast signal
confirmation_chain.description: Use official X as an early hint only.

confirmation_chain.label: Confirm
confirmation_chain.description: Promote only after release notes, status, or newsroom posts line up.

channels.label: Anthropic release notes
channels.why_it_matters: Claude and API product truth.

channels.label: Claude Code release notes
channels.why_it_matters: Developer-surface changes often land here first.

channels.label: Anthropic status
channels.why_it_matters: Incident truth with an official status surface.

channels.label: Anthropic news
channels.why_it_matters: Long-form launches and research framing.

channels.label: Anthropic on X
channels.why_it_matters: Fast hints and public demos before formal confirmation.

vendors.label: Google Gemini
vendors.description: Track Gemini API, model, and platform changes across official Google AI surfaces.
vendors.official_first_move: Start with Gemini API changelog before extrapolating from screenshots or summaries.
vendors.x_policy_summary: Treat Google AI / DeepMind on X as observation until the Gemini changelog, docs, or blog confirms it.

starter_watchlist.name: Gemini signals
starter_watchlist.briefing_goal: What changed across official Gemini channels this week?

confirmation_chain.label: Fast signal
confirmation_chain.description: Use official Google AI social posts as observation only.

confirmation_chain.label: Confirm
confirmation_chain.description: Promote only after the Gemini API changelog or official Google blog confirms it.

channels.label: Gemini API changelog
channels.why_it_matters: API, model, and tier changes land here first.

channels.label: Gemini API docs
channels.why_it_matters: Reference surface for current model and feature behavior.

channels.label: Gemini API deprecations
channels.why_it_matters: Shutdown windows and recommended replacements belong here, not in social chatter.

channels.label: Vertex Gemini API status
channels.why_it_matters: Official ops signal for the Vertex Gemini API surface; treat it as scoped status, not total Gemini truth.

channels.label: Google DeepMind blog
channels.why_it_matters: Long-form product and research launches.

channels.label: Google DeepMind on X
channels.why_it_matters: Fast hints, screenshots, and demos before formal docs catch up.

vendors.label: xAI
vendors.description: Track Grok and API/runtime changes through official developer notes and status channels.
vendors.official_first_move: Start with xAI developer release notes and status before repeating a product rumor.
vendors.x_policy_summary: Treat xAI on X as observation only until release notes or status confirms the change.

starter_watchlist.name: xAI signals
starter_watchlist.briefing_goal: What changed across official xAI channels this week?

confirmation_chain.label: Fast signal
confirmation_chain.description: Use xAI posts on X as early hints only.

confirmation_chain.label: Confirm
confirmation_chain.description: Promote only after developer release notes or status corroborates it.

channels.label: xAI release notes
channels.why_it_matters: Developer-facing Grok and API changes.

channels.label: xAI status
channels.why_it_matters: Reliability and incident truth.

channels.label: xAI developer docs
channels.why_it_matters: Reference surface for current API behavior.

channels.label: xAI on X
channels.why_it_matters: Fast hints and launch teases before formal notes land.
